title: Opening for Software Engineer at 1mg Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Software Engineer at 1mg Capital India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at 1mg Capital India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Howrah-based team.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
